warning.body: If you forget your password, your data is lost. There is no recovery path. Write it down in a safe place before you continue.

welcome.tagline: Your health data. Local. Encrypted. Yours.

local.title: Local
local.body: All data stays on this device.

open.title: Open
open.body: No account, no server, no tracking.

does.title: What Phylax does
does.body: Stores your entries encrypted in this browser. Nobody but you can read them.

does-not.title: What Phylax does not do
does-not.body: No server communication. No password recovery. No support that "resets your password".

means.title: What this means for you
means.body: If you lose your password, your data is lost. We recommend a password manager.
